title: hedyotis sabulosa
intro: Hedyotis sabulosa, also known as the creeping hedyotis or creeping buttonweed, is a perennial plant species native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hedyotis sabulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough and sore throat, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Hedyotis sabulosa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
